items.summary: In the backend (main.mo), ensure the admin/founder principal is reliably stored at canister initialization time (using the deployer's principal). Expose a stable query `isAdmin() : async Bool` that returns `true` only when the caller's principal matches the stored admin principal. Ensure this function works correctly after canister upgrades and does not reset the stored admin principal.

In frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, fix the `useIsAdmin` React Query hook so it correctly calls the backend `isAdmin()` query and returns the boolean result. Ensure the hook re-fetches when the authenticated actor changes and that errors are handled gracefully (defaulting to false).

In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, update the Admin Dashboard tab visibility logic to use the result of the `useIsAdmin` hook. The Admin tab should only be rendered and visible when `isAdmin` is true. Display a clear visual indicator (e.g., a badge or label) on the Admin tab so the founder can confirm they have admin access after logging in.
